title: Tier 1 stubs: filters, lists, custom_emojis, preferences, markers
description:
Implement all Tier 1 endpoints that return empty arrays or minimal stubs. Required for clients to complete startup. Endpoints to implement: GET /api/v1/custom_emojis returns []; GET /api/v1/filters returns []; GET /api/v2/filters returns []; GET /api/v1/lists returns []; GET /api/v1/preferences returns object with keys posting:default:visibility, posting:default:sensitive, posting:default:language, reading:expand:media, reading:expand:spoilers; GET /api/v1/markers returns {}; POST /api/v1/markers body ignored returns {}; GET /api/v1/apps/verify_credentials returns Application object; GET /api/v1/suggestions returns []; GET /api/v1/trends/statuses returns []; GET /api/v1/trends/tags returns []; GET /api/v1/trends/links returns []; GET /api/v1/directory returns [].

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to test each of these endpoints against mastodon.social and verify the exact response shape.

Test discipline: each endpoint tested individually against mastodon.social oracle response; verify empty arrays are [] not null; verify preferences object has all required keys with correct default values; verify all endpoints require authentication except directory which is public. Real in-memory SQLite for any DB tests.

Defensive programming: all stubs return Content-Type application/json; all return 200 not 404; returning 404 causes clients to abort; no .unwrap() outside tests.
acceptance_criteria: All listed endpoints return correct shapes with 200; empty arrays are [] not null; preferences has all required keys; Content-Type is application/json; all auth-required endpoints reject unauthenticated requests with 401
